channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Penn State routs Boise State to advance to CFP semifinal; Ashton Jeanty comes up short of rushing record
item.description: The Penn State Nittany Lions are now one win away from heading to the national championship after their New Year's Eve beatdown of Boise State.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jeanty falls short of record as dream season gets stuffed by Penn State defense in CFP loss
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Ashton Jeanty took the handoff on Boise State's first play and made it just a few steps before being greeted by a wall of dark blue Penn State jerseys that swallowed him up and shoved him backward for no gain.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: No. 5 Penn State bottles up Jeanty, beats No. 8 Boise State 31-14 in Fiesta Bowl
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Penn State defenders clogged every hole, stretched out every outside run, closed with ferocity. Everywhere that Ashton Jeanty turned, he ran into Nittany Lions. The Heisman Trophy runner-up still went over 100 yards, but he sure had to work for it.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: US beats Canada 4-1 to finish first in its group at world junior championship
item.description: OTTAWA, Ontario (AP) — Danny Nelson scored the eventual game-winner in the third period and Trey Augustine made 38 saves, leading the United States to a 4-1 win over Canada on Tuesday night and into the top spot in Group A at the world junior hockey championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Arizona State extends coach Kenny Dillingham 5 more years, AP source says
item.description: Arizona State coach Kenny Dillingham has agreed to a five-year contract extension on the eve of the Sun Devils’ College Football Playoff quarterfinal game, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: John Marshall, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — St. Louis coach Jim Montgomery walked around before Tuesday night's Winter Classic. He looked at the growing crowd soaking in the festive atmosphere. He thought about all the famous ballplayers who played at Wrigley Field.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lenny Randle, major leaguer repeatedly in the spotlight for 12 seasons, dies at 75
item.description: MURRIETA, Calif. (AP) — Lenny Randle, a big league player for 12 seasons who spoke five languages, performed stand-up comedy, was dubbed “The Most Interesting Man in Baseball” and was suspended for punching his Texas Rangers manager, has died. He was 75.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: South Carolina's Shane Beamer separated from opposing coach in Citrus Bowl following taunt after injury
item.description: Shane Beamer needed to be separated from Bret Bielema on Tuesday after Bielema taunted Beamer following a player's injury in the Citrus Bowl.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Matthew Gaudreau's wife announces the birth of their first child months after tragic death
item.description: Four months after her husband Matthew Gaudreau and his brother Johnny Gaudreau were killed by an alleged drunk driver, Madeline Gaudreau announced the birth of their first child.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pro Picks: Lions will beat the Vikings in showdown for the NFC's No. 1 seed
item.description: The NFC’s No. 1 seed, two division titles and two playoff spots are on the line in Week 18 of the NFL's regular season. Game No. 272 on Sunday night between the Detroit Lions and Minnesota Vikings is a showdown for the NFC North and the conference’s top spot. The loser drops to the No.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Resting or playing running back Saquon Barkley is a tougher decision than it seems for Eagles
item.description: Saquon Barkley’s pursuit of Eric Dickerson’s 40-year-old rushing record could get grounded by his coach. Nick Sirianni’s decision is more difficult than it seems. Barkley needs 101 yards rushing against his former team on Sunday to set the NFL’s single-season record.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: The upperclassmen: Oregon, Ohio St. leaned on well-traveled veteran QBs to reach Rose Bowl, CFP
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Oregon and Ohio State are two of the most daunting teams left in the College Football Playoff in no small part because they've both got starting quarterbacks who had already seen — and beaten — just about everything they're ever going to face at this level of the sport before they
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: SDFNL All-Star Showcase
item.description:
Boys All-Star Game : Blue Stars 21- Red Stars 17
Girls Flag Football All-Star Game: Blue Stars 6 - Red Stars 0
San Diego 13U Youth Super Bowl: San Diego Bolts 34 - Oceanside Warriors 22
item.dc:creator: Chase Izidoro, Fox 5

item.title: Saquon Barkley tops 2,000 yards rushing as Eagles beat Cowboys 41-7 to clinch NFC East
item.description: Barkley rushed for 167 yards to top 2,000 on the season, backup quarterback Kenny Pickett ran and threw for scores before departing with injured ribs, and the Eagles clinched the division title by routing the Dallas Cowboys 41-7 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Cubs deal former 1B prospect Matt Mervis to Marlins for utilityman
item.description: The Cubs have traded one former infield prospect for another. ESPN's Jeff Passan reported on his X feed early Sunday afternoon that the Cubs have dealt first baseman Matt Mervis to the Miami Marlins for utilityman Vidal Bruján, according to sources.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Mavs star Luka Doncic is latest pro athlete whose home was burglarized, business manager says
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Luka Doncic of the Dallas Mavericks is the latest professional athlete whose home has been burglarized. The star guard's business manager told multiple media outlets Saturday there was a break-in at Doncic's home.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Southern California overcomes 17-point deficit to beat Texas A&M 35-31 in Las Vegas Bowl
item.description: LAS VEGAS (AP) — The Southern California Trojans ended their season the way they started it. On Sept. 1 at Allegiant Stadium in the opener, the Trojans overcame a third-quarter deficit and scored with eight seconds left to beat LSU 27-20.
item.dc:creator: W.G. RAMIREZ, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Syracuse defeats Washington State in DIRECTV Holiday Bowl
item.description: Syracuse quarterback Kyle McCord put on a stellar performance Friday to help his team win the DIRECTV Holiday Bowl at Snapdragon Stadium.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from organization in the coming days
item.description: (AP) -- Athletics president Dave Kaval will resign from the organization after being the public face of the organization's planned move from Oakland to Las Vegas. Kaval has been president of the A's for the past eight years and will step down from the role on Dec.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Bulls blow 21 point lead in 141-133 loss to Atlanta
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Jalen Johnson had a career-high 30 points and the Atlanta Hawks rallied from a late 21-point deficit by scoring 50 points in the fourth quarter in a 141-133 win over the Chicago Bulls on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: At least 65 million tune in for Netflix NFL Christmas Day games. NBA holiday ratings also skyrocket
item.description: LeBron James and the NBA are going to have make room for the NFL on Christmas. That shouldn't be a problem. Both leagues were winners on Wednesday. Netflix set records as the most-streamed NFL games in U.S. history while the NBA had its best holiday numbers in five years according to Nielsen.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY and TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Holiday Bowl to kick off at brand-new Snapdragon Stadium for the first time
item.description: The Holiday Bowl has been woven into the fabric of San Diego for four decades. For a football city without a professional sports team, there is even more excitement surrounding this annual event.
item.dc:creator: Jaime Chambers, Fox 5

item.title: DIRECTV Holiday Bowl: What to know before going
item.description: It will be the first time the Holiday Bowl is held in Mission Valley — where it had been for more than 40 years — since before the pandemic. The two most recent bowl games were played in Petco Park.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5
